title: vitis scabriuscula
intro: Vitis scabriuscula, also known as the rough-leaved grape, is a deciduous climbing vine native to China. It is a type of grapevine that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis scabriuscula include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Vitis scabriuscula is often combined with other herbs to make teas, tinctures, and decoctions that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
